title: An Act relative to certain affordable housing and cultural space in the Brighton section of the city of Boston

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Michael J. Moran of Boston, a petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 4415) of Michael J. Moran (with the approval of the mayor and city council) relative to the procurement and award of contracts for construction of a certain affordable housing and cultural space in the Brighton section of the city of Boston.  State Administration and Regulatory Oversight.  [Local Approval Received.]

actions.description: Referred to the committee on State Administration and Regulatory Oversight

related_entities.name: committee on State Administration and Regulatory Oversight

actions.description: Hearing scheduled for 09/09/2025 from 10:00 AM-1:00 PM in A-1 and virtual
Bill reported favorably by committee and referred to the committee on House Ways and Means

related_entities.name: the committee on House Ways and Means
committee on House Ways and Means

actions.description: Committee recommended ought to pass with an amendment, substituting therefor a bill with the same title, see H5442
Referred to the committee on House Steering, Policy and Scheduling with the amendment pending

related_entities.name: committee on House Steering, Policy and Scheduling with the amendment pending

actions.description: Committee reported that the matter be placed in the Orders of the Day for the next sitting for a second reading with the amendment pending
Read second, amended (as recommended by the committee on House Ways and Means)
